agent_output:
Tool plan:

1. read_file(path="/etc/config.yaml")
2. grep(pattern="timeout", path="/var/log/app.log")
3. write_file(path="/tmp/diagnosis.md", content="...")

ground_truth.name: Agentic Tool-Use Plan
ground_truth.scenario_summary: Agent produces a 6-9 step tool-call plan to reproduce, locate, fix, and verify a failing pytest. Tool palette is fixed at 7 tools; ordering invariants must hold (reproduce-before-fix, fix-before-verify); reference test name and at least one candidate function must be cited.

ordering_invariants.label: reproduce (run_tests on failing target) appears before fix (edit_file)
fix (edit_file) appears before verify (run_tests after edit)

phantom_tool_check.description: Any token that looks like a tool call (lowercase_word followed by '(' at line start or after a numbered item) but is NOT in the tool palette counts as phantom. Penalty per phantom = 0.10 (capped at 0.40).

primary_metric.description: score = (required_tool_recall * ordering_correctness) + 0.10 * argument_citation_rate - phantom_tool_penalty - step_count_violation_penalty. Threshold 0.60 reflects difficulty of getting all required tools + correct ordering + cited arguments without phantom invocations.
